intent: A wrapper that pressure-tests a PRD before the build — runs Expand / Hold / Reduce modes, scores strategic dimensions, and sharpens the PRD without authoring it.

dimensions.name: review-modes
dimensions.criterion: Runs in explicit Expand / Hold / Reduce modes.

dimensions.name: dimension-scoring
dimensions.criterion: Scores the plan on strategic dimensions with concrete next steps.

dimensions.name: sharpen-not-author
dimensions.criterion: Sharpens (pressure-tests) the PRD; it does not author requirements.

dimensions.name: wraps-strategy-advisor
dimensions.criterion: Composes strategy-advisor for genuine option generation and trade-offs.
